projects.name: EigenAgent
projects.description: Fully local LLM desktop assistant built with Rust, Tauri, and React. Runs GGUF-quantized models offline via llama.cpp with token-level streaming and MCP-based tool invocation.

projects.name: Mechanistic Interpretability Toolkit
projects.description: Interpretability toolkit for GPT-2 and Qwen3 supporting token attribution, attention head analysis, and activation patching via TransformerLens, FastAPI, and React. Streams logit-lens predictions over WebSocket.

projects.name: Semantic Backlinks Generator
projects.description: Python tool for Obsidian-style blogs using sentence transformers and FAISS for efficient semantic similarity search. Includes a graph visualization pipeline for tuning density and confidence.

projects.name: CoT Cue Articulation
projects.description: Fine-tuning pipeline studying chain-of-thought faithfulness in frontier reasoning models.

projects.name: Rodent Seizure Detection
projects.description: EEG feature extraction and SVM-based seizure detection pipeline for epileptic mice.

projects.name: MacOSClipboard
projects.description: A copy-paste clipboard manager built for macOS in Swift.
